name: Dragon Revival Rhapsody
name_jp: ドラゴン・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>復</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>活</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>奏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a Spellcaster monster: You can target up to 2 Dragon monsters in your GY, including at least 1 Normal Monster; Special Summon them, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, your opponent takes no damage. You can only activate 1 "Dragon Revival Rhapsody" per turn.
